title: Public Health Agency of Canada publications by major topic area - Canada.ca
content:
## Publications by major topic area
In alignment with the Government of Canada’s Greening Government Strategy and our ongoing shift to digital, we will be transitioning to a print-on-demand model. All publications remain available online at Canada.ca.
- Biosafety and Microbiology
- Chronic Diseases Asthma Cancer Cardiovascular Disease Chronic Respiratory Diseases Diabetes Mental Illnesses Neurological Conditions
- Cardiovascular Disease
- Chronic Respiratory Diseases
- Neurological Conditions
- Communicable Disease Epidemiology
- Enteric and Foodborne Diseases
- Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder (FASD)
- Initiatives and Strategies
- Perinatal/Child Health
- Respiratory Disease Tuberculosis
- Sexual Health and Sexually Transmitted Infections
